heading: Strategy
content:
Iseyon Analytics helps organizations elevate business strategy and intelligence using the [Strategy](https://www.strategy.com/) (formerly MicroStrategy) platform. Our consulting services enable enterprises to harness the full power of Strategy, unifying data, simplifying access, and empowering faster, more confident decision-making.

[Analytics and BI platforms](https://www.gartner.com/reviews/market/analytics-business-intelligence-platforms) are defined by their ability to prepare data, visualize insights, and support decision-making across functions. Gartner research describes these platforms as tools that ingest data from multiple sources, enable interactive dashboards and reports, and empower collaboration for informed decisions.

[Strategy](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/MicroStrategy) is an established BI and analytics provider with a long history in enterprise reporting and analytics solutions, used by organizations across industries including government, retail, and healthcare

#### **Administration**

Iseyon provides complete Strategy administration services including installation, configuration, user account setup, data warehouse connectivity, and security management. We ensure a secure and scalable foundation for enterprise-wide analytics.

#### **Development**

Our team defines your business intelligence strategy and builds a roadmap for Strategy adoption within your organization. Iseyon develops tailored solutions that align analytics with business objectives.

#### **Customization**

Iseyon customizes Strategy to meet unique organizational needs. We adapt dashboards, reports, and workflows to deliver personalized insights and maximize business impact.

#### **Conversion**

We help enterprises migrate content from other business intelligence systems into Strategy. Iseyon ensures smooth transitions with minimal disruption, enabling organizations to leverage Strategy’s advanced capabilities.

#### **Optimization**

Iseyon applies best practices to optimize Strategy performance. Our solutions improve speed, scalability, and efficiency, ensuring reliable analytics across the enterprise.

#### **Maintenance & Support**

With 24×7 support and scheduled health checks, Iseyon ensures smooth operation of Strategy environments. Our proactive maintenance services minimize downtime and maximize value.

#### **Strategy Mobile**

Iseyon enables organizations to build custom mobile BI apps without coding. Touch-optimized reporting and interactive visualizations — including bubble charts, network graphs, time series charts, and interactive grids — deliver immersive analytics experiences on iOS, Android, and BlackBerry devices.

#### **Mobile BI**

Our mobile BI solutions empower decision-makers to access insights on the go. Iseyon integrates Strategy with big data, cloud, and social media trends, enabling real-time answers and agile decision-making from anywhere.
homePageDescription: Iseyon provides enterprise BI dashboards with governed, trusted analytics and executive-level reporting, empowering leadership with real-time operational and strategic visibility.

faqs.question: What Strategy consulting services does Iseyon provide?
faqs.answer: Iseyon delivers comprehensive consulting services for MicroStrategy (Strategy), including administration, implementation, development, customization, migration, optimization, mobile BI enablement, and ongoing support. We help enterprises unify data, simplify analytics access, and accelerate data-driven decision-making across the organization.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon support Strategy administration and deployment?
faqs.answer: Iseyon provides complete Strategy administration services, including installation, configuration, user account setup, data warehouse connectivity, and security management. Our team ensures a secure, scalable, and high-performance analytics foundation aligned with enterprise governance standards.

faqs.question: Can Iseyon migrate existing BI systems to Strategy?
faqs.answer: Yes, Iseyon helps organizations migrate dashboards, reports, and data assets from other business intelligence platforms into Strategy. We ensure smooth transitions with minimal disruption, optimized performance, and preserved data integrity—enabling organizations to leverage advanced analytics capabilities efficiently.

faqs.question: How does Iseyon optimize Strategy performance?
faqs.answer: Iseyon applies best practices in architecture design, query optimization, caching strategies, and infrastructure tuning to enhance speed, scalability, and reliability. Our optimization services ensure consistent performance for enterprise-wide analytics and reporting environments.

faqs.question: Does Iseyon provide Strategy mobile BI and ongoing support?
faqs.answer: Absolutely, Iseyon enables organizations to build mobile BI applications with touch-optimized dashboards and interactive visualizations across iOS and Android devices. We also provide 24×7 maintenance, proactive monitoring, and scheduled health checks to ensure continuous system reliability and maximum business value.
